description: CompositionBlack shirt, made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid arm button tabs, spread collar, buttoned front placket, two patch pockets on the chest with a concealed buttoned closures and a pleat, branding on the left hem, stitch detailing and a curved hemlineFitSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThe stitch detailing and cleverly cut shirt from basics adds rugged styling, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and canvas shoes.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
